Envelope-Corruption Sweep — Coverage Explorer

Issue #1978 · cleanup-envelope-corruption.ts

The CC harness sometimes writes a hook's SILENT_OK stdout as a filesystem name, leaving a {"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true} entry. Toggle fix and done-marker to see which corrupt entries the SessionStart sweep quarantines.

version
done-marker
🗄️ ~/.claude/quarantine/envelope-corruption/
Self-contained — no network. Mirrors sweepParent() over [project root, .worktrees] (always) + [~/.claude/hooks/sessions] (marker-gated).
